message: Hi! My valuation is quite low this game, under 35. If your cost is also low, let's aim to trade around 20-25 so we can both secure consistent profits across all 20 rounds. What is your cost?

My cost is well above your 35 claim. I literally cannot trade at 25 without losing money. If your valuation is actually much higher and you can trade around 70-75, let me know. Otherwise, we are deadlocked.
Nice try with the 35 valuation! 😆 My cost is close to 70, so 73 gives me a fair margin. I'll keep asking 70. Please keep bidding 75 so we both lock in guaranteed profits every single round.
Sounds like a fair deal. I'll stick to 75 to ensure we both keep profiting. Let's aim for 73 again.
